reason_of_clustering: These entities are all related to live cattle futures, representing different contract expiration months. They are grouped together as they reflect the pricing and trading dynamics of livestock markets specific to live cattle, which can impact forecasting and investment strategies.

This cluster includes all entities pertaining to feeder cattle futures for different months. They are interconnected as they influence the price of feeder cattle in the market and provide investors with insights into market trends specifically for the feeder segment of the cattle market.
